name: IRC_TP_PARTNER_NOTIFS
description: This table is used for storing partner notification data to be sent to the partner and the status of the notifications.

columns.Name: NOTIFICATION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key value of this table. System generated.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_B table.

columns.Name: PROVISIONING_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_TP_PARTNER_PROVISNGS table.

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the action for which the partner should receive notification.

columns.Name: ACTION_REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Action reason for the action type if applicable.

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the entity type of the action.

columns.Name: ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores Surrogate key of the entity type.

columns.Name: ACTION_DATA
columns.Comments: Additional action data stored in JSON format.

columns.Name: ACTION_DATE
columns.Comments: Action occurrence date in timestamp format.

columns.Name: REQUESTED_BY
columns.Comments: Stores the id of the user who triggered the action.

columns.Name: NOTIFICATION_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status code of the notification.

columns.Name: TRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: This column stores the number of tries made to invoke the partner service.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: PROCESSING_TIME
columns.Comments: Time taken to process the row in milliseconds
